ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research output */,
  "dspace_id" INTEGER /* DSpace identifier for the output */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the research output was issued */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research output */,
  "dataspace_link" TEXT /* Link to the associated data space */,
  "datatype" TEXT /* Type of data associated with the output */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* A brief summary of the research output */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the research output */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the research output is published */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the research output has been accessed or downloaded */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the research output has been cited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research output was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research output was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_outputs_datatype FOREIGN KEY ("datatype") REFERENCES datatypes ("datatype_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the author is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_research_output" (
  "ar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author-research output relationship */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research output */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author linked to the output */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the research output */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author-research output relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author-research output relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_research_output_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_research_output_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES research_outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsoring_organizations" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsoring organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring organization */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the sponsoring organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the sponsoring organization's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sponsoring organization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sponsoring organization record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_sponsorship" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the output-sponsorship relationship */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research output */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsoring organization */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number associated with the sponsorship */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding provided by the sponsor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the output-sponsorship relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the output-sponsorship relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_sponsorship_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsoring_organizations ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_sponsorship_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES research_outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the contract */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research output */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the DOE contract associated with the output */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES research_outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datatypes" (
  "datatype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datatype */,
  "datatype_name" TEXT /* Name of the datatype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datatype_id")
)
